task_completion.description: Log into the OpenSIS system using the provided credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenSIS dashboard or main interface is visible, indicating a successful login as the admin user.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the section to add or edit school information.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen displays a form or page titled 'School Setup', 'School Information', or 'Add a School'.
The text 'Riverside Academy' is visible in the school name or title input field.

task_completion.description: Enter the address, city, state, and zip code for the new school.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The fields for address contain '450 River Road', city contains 'Springfield', state contains 'IL', and zip code contains '62704'.

task_completion.description: Enter the phone number for the new school.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text '217-555-0198' is visible in the phone number input field.
A success message indicating the school was saved/added, or 'Riverside Academy' is visible in the system's list of schools or school selection dropdown.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OpenSIS web interface via a web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser (like Chrome or Firefox) is visible with the URL pointing to http://localhost/opensis/.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a terminal or database client to insert the record directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show interaction with the OpenSIS graphical user interface, not a MySQL command line or database management tool.

integrity.description: The agent actually entered the data into the form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the data populated inside the standard OpenSIS web form input fields, rather than in a text editor or a mock HTML file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must create a new school record with the exact following details: Name: 'Riverside Academy', Address: '450 River Road', City: 'Springfield', State: 'IL', Zip: '62704', Phone: '217-555-0198'. All data is synthetic/fictional but must be entered exactly as specified into the OpenSIS system.
